text: The system shall allow guests to search for available rooms by date range and number of occupants.
The system shall display room photos for each room type.
The system shall send a confirmation email to the guest after a booking is completed.
The system shall accept payment by credit card and PayPal.
The system response time for room search shall not exceed 2 seconds.
The system shall be available 24 hours per day with downtime not exceeding 30 minutes per month.
The system shall encrypt all guest personal information using AES-256.
The system shall comply with GDPR data retention rules.
The system shall support concurrent bookings by up to 500 users.
The system shall allow administrators to add new room types from the admin panel.
The user interface shall be available in English Spanish and Italian.
The system shall log all reservation changes for auditing.
The system shall recover from a database failure within 5 minutes.
The system shall be deployable on AWS Azure and on-premise servers.
The system shall handle peak loads during the summer holiday period.
The system shall allow guests to cancel a reservation up to 48 hours before check-in.
The booking page shall be simple and easy to use.
The system shall process payment transactions within 3 seconds.
